name: Ned Washington
abstract: Ned Washington (born Edward Michael Washington, August 15, 1901 – December 20, 1976) was an American lyricist born in Scranton, Pennsylvania.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: Ned Washington had won two Academy Awards... Benny Carter was a ghost writer for Ned Washington... They gave it to Ned Washington... he gave it back.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
